name: Generative Infinity Zoom
description: Recursive ComfyUI zoom: T2I Root -> Img2Img Upscale Children.

renderer_args.prompt_t2i: organic biological texture, intricate veins, microscopic, 8k, sharp focus
renderer_args.prompt_img2img: Make the image ultrasharp by adding only tiny missing micro-details. Do NOT remove, alter, or warp edges. High fidelity, 8k.
